finding: emit_ts.rs production code (lines 1-1237: the order-preserving `J` value + all render/emit fns + generate_types_ts[_from_json]) moved byte-for-byte; only the #[cfg(test)] block changed. No sort/escape/ordering edit. Confirmed by the byte-identical regen of BOTH surfaces.

The generator is a pure spec->String transform: its only deps are indexmap + serde + std::fmt (+ serde_json for from_json). No app types, no DB, no Config. Relocating it into a build-DB-free framework crate is sound; sdk cargo check --workspace exit 0.

E8 types.ts: regenerated ui + desktop with the RELOCATED generator -> `git status` empty for ui/src/api-client/types.ts AND desktop/ui/src/api-client/types.ts. Generator was byte-preserved (the chunk's core requirement). Restored via git checkout.

E8 openapi.json: ui + desktop canonically-equal via `jq -S . old == jq -S . new` (top-level key ORDER is a deterministic fn of the linkme dep-graph, per the E8 REFINEMENT; the moved TAIL changed no route registration, so in practice bytes match too). Restored via git checkout.

The hardcoded `output_path.join("../src/api-client/types.ts")` (openapi/mod.rs:100) is removed from the moved code; `finish_and_emit` takes `output_dir: &Path` + `types_ts_path: &Path`. Each app derives its own path at the call site (ziee: output_dir/../src/api-client/types.ts; desktop: same relative to desktop/ui/openapi). A second app can emit to any layout.

Only the app-agnostic TAIL (finish_api -> openapi.json -> emit_ts -> types.ts) moved; the app-specific HEAD (Config load, set_app_data_dir/set_caches_config/init_repositories, module create+init) stays in ziee's generate_openapi_spec because it names app types. create_modules+build_api_router already framework (B2). Desktop injects its merged routes before calling the tail. Same app-owns-the-config-bound-head seam as B2/B3/B4/B5.

The old parity test conflated generator-correctness (app-agnostic) with per-app regen-drift (needs ziee's committed files). Split: generator_golden_fixture (SDK, small committed fixture openapi.json -> committed expected types.ts, byte-identical) proves the pure fn; types_ts_parity[_desktop] (moved to ziee) proves ziee re-ran openapi-regen. SDK never depends on ziee's committed artifacts.

SDK: 3 tests pass (escapes_string_literals, quotes_non_identifier_member_keys, generator_golden_fixture). The fixture types.ts was produced by the current generator (so it's a real golden that catches future generator drift, not a tautology). ziee: types_ts_parity + types_ts_parity_desktop + generates_spec_and_types_without_live_db retained; they exercise the same relocated generator + the app driver head.

ziee crate-root re-exports source directly from framework: `pub use ziee_framework::openapi::emit_ts::generate_types_ts_from_json` + `pub use ziee_framework::openapi::finish_and_emit`. So `ziee::generate_types_ts_from_json` (desktop) + `ziee::finish_and_emit` (desktop) resolve unchanged; `openapi::generate_openapi_spec` (main.rs, lib.rs:664) unchanged. Zero call-site edits outside the 3 touched files.

framework Cargo.toml gains indexmap(serde) + serde_json (promoted from dev). lib.rs `pub mod openapi;`. Versions match the ziee server catalog so the single src-app/Cargo.lock unifies (no duplicate build). cargo check -p ziee-framework + --workspace exit 0.

First pass used a transitive `pub use ziee_framework::openapi::{emit_ts, finish_and_emit}` in ziee's openapi/mod.rs re-exported again by lib.rs -> `-D unused-imports` flagged the `emit_ts` module re-export (transitive-pub-use lint). Fixed by re-exporting both directly at the crate root and using full paths internally. Both binaries + sdk workspace compile clean; zero NEW warnings (the 3 pre-existing lib warnings are unrelated mcp/voice dead-code).

Desktop openapi.rs still builds the combined server+desktop router (create_desktop_modules + build_desktop_api_routes + server_router.merge), then calls ziee::finish_and_emit(combined_router, api_doc, output_path, &types_ts_path). Removed now-dead `use std::fs` + the `mut` on api_doc. cargo check -p ziee-desktop exit 0; desktop types.ts byte-identical on regen.

skeleton-server (SDK-only consumer) still cargo checks after the move — it can now reach the generator/tail via ziee_framework::openapi without ziee's domain. No domain type leaked into the framework openapi module (grep: no `crate::modules`, no app Config, no ziee-* domain crate in emit_ts/mod.rs).
